title: Hire an expert/consultant
excerpt:
We are a media agency and services company.  We sell media and event solutions to advertising agencies and customers direct.  We also sell Wi-Fi and network solutions to agencies and customers direct. 
Looking for an exp…

posts.author: dnaldini-2021 (Denise Naldini)
posts.cookedHtml:
We are a media agency and services company. We sell media and event solutions to advertising agencies and customers direct. We also sell Wi-Fi and network solutions to agencies and customers direct.

Looking for an expert/consultant to help set up our business on monday.com from start to finish. Located in Melbourne, Aus.

Thanks!

posts.author: ElenaK (Elena Korolkova (Kick Consulting))
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @dnaldini-2021

I hope Melbourne is treating you with nice weather despite the lockdown.

My name is Elena and I’m the founder of Kick Consulting. I’m located in Norther NSW. Myself and my team have worked with multiple clients who sell a variety of services to their customers.

I personally have specialised in Monday.com for three (or even four) years now and love the software! I also have a background in management and projects, allowing me to streamline my clients’ processes with ease! On my team, I also have another Relationship manager (Lauren), another 2 Monday specialist, Agile project manager and a developer/Zapier expert, so you will never have to wait for answers.

We offer a complimentary 1-hour initial meeting to review your current processes, assess your needs, and to discuss options going forward. You can book a session through this link(Calendly - Kick Consulting).

My team and I look forward to hearing from you.

Elena

posts.author: Andrew1 (Andrew)
posts.cookedHtml:

posts.author: Bianca (Bianca Clement)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @dnaldini-2021 , just checking if you’d found a resolution to this?
It sounds like something I could resolve within a couple of days for you.
Feel free to email me at biancajclement@gmail.com if you’re still seeking assistance.
I’m located in Sydney, so nice and easy

posts.author: DamcoSolutions ( Neelam Bhatt)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @dnaldini-2021

Implementing monday .com for your company is a commendable decision. With monday dot com implementation, you can easily organize and manage all your customers and corporate connections through boards. By setting up monday.com boards, you can group customer and agency details like name, address, network connection type, etc. by forming fields and follow-up easily for better assistance. Besides, by performing monday.com consultant with your regular workspace tools, you can automate as much as your internal processes that consume more time and attain better productivity.

monday .com developers from Damco solutions can help you with seamless implementation, board development, and integration. We’re an esteemed monday .com preferred partner. Our dedicated developers with profound knowledge of the monday .com platform have helped a wide range of enterprises with implementation and integrations.

Regards
Neelam B
Damco Solutions
Phone: +1 609 632 0350 | Email : info@damcogroup.com
